protocol.name: phoc_device_state_unstable_v1

interface.name: zphoc_device_state_v1
interface.description: This interface provides information about the device state, such as whether a hardware keyboard is attached.

enum.name: capability
enum.description: Bitmask of capabilities present on the device.

entry.name: tablet_mode_switch
entry.summary: The device has a tablet mode switch

entry.name: lid_switch
entry.summary: The device has a lid switch

entry.name: keyboard
entry.summary: The device has a hardware keyboard attached

event.name: capabilities
event.description: Sent when the device capabilities change. The capabilities argument is a bitmask of the capability enum values.
